_note: Reference Gate Ledger for a large multi-crate app. Seed by walking your verify script; pin each checker with `crucible approve`. T3 rows make prose-only rules explicit instead of pretending they are enforced.

gates.rule: no reward-hacked tests (skips, focused-only, assertion-free, CI retry masks)
frontend↔backend command/type contract stays in sync
production modules have deterministic flow coverage
change-to-package impact selection is correct and fail-closed
changed high-risk lines have mutants killed
gates.reason: promotion target: move to T1 blocking when highRiskUnits are touched

gates.rule: changed code is reachable from the test suite
gates.reason: reachability only; mutation is the behavior keystone
noisy on large trees; keep out of the required per-change lane

gates.rule: no drive-by refactors outside the declared change scope
gates.reason: human judgment; no mechanical checker can fully distinguish drive-by from in-scope work
candidate for a cargo-metadata boundary checker at T1 later
